MINI MINUTES: Judge Harry F. Dorfman; Clerk: B. Paredes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Abel Sandoval is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendants Antonia Castillo, and Ivan Castillo are present.
Attorney Jason Cabot appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ZADIK SHAPIRO, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Sep-16-2013 is vacated. (D501/JPT)
